---
title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
author: Truman Capote
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★
rating: 3
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Breakfast at Tiffany's
Somehow liked it, expected it to be a super classic, talking about like an issue or alluding to something or just being a very memorable story but it kind of just is. I feel that its somewhat because of the narration style where its being told from the perspective of a friend, much like the narration style of the great gatsuby and so i feel it kind of detracts from the story a little. But overall its quite a wholesome and enjoyable read, not many like wow moments or interesting moments but it was easy to keep reading and not want to put the book down so I guess it has that going for it.

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
